    intro hp
    rw [hp]
    have h₁ : p ≠ 0 := Nat.Prime.ne_zero h.out
    have h₂ : p ≠ 1 := Nat.Prime.ne_one h.out
    have h₃ : (4 * ((p - 1) / 4) + 1 : ℕ) = p := by omega
    rw [h₃] at *
    have h₄ : (-1 : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by
      intro h₅
      have h₆ : (p : ZMod p) = 0 := by simp
      have h₇ : (1 : ZMod p) = 0 := by simpa [h₅] using h₆
      exact absurd h₇ (by decide)
    have h₅ : (ZMod p)ˣ ≃* (Units (ZMod p)) := by rfl
    have h₆ : IsSquare (-1 : ZMod p) ↔ p % 4 = 1 := by
      apply ZMod.isSquare_neg_one_iff
      exact h.out
    rw [hp] at h₆
    simp at h₆
    have h₇ : Fintype.card { s : ZMod p | s ^ 2 = -1 } = 2 := by
      have h₈ : ∃ x : ZMod p, x ^ 2 = -1 := by
        apply Exists.intro (sqrt (-1))
        simp [h₆]
      cases' h₈ with x hx
      have h₉ : (-x) ^ 2 = -1 := by simp [hx]
      have h₁₀ : x ≠ -x := by
        intro h₁₁
        have h₁₂ : 2 * x = 0 := by simpa [h₁₁] using add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg.mp (by simp)
        have h₁₃ : (2 : ZMod p) = 0 ∨ x = 0 := by
          apply eq_zero_or_eq_zero_of_mul_eq_zero h₁₂
        cases' h₁₃ with h₁₄ h₁₄
        · have h₁₅ : p ∣ 2 := by
            apply Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero
            rw [← ZMod.natCast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd]
            exact h₁₄
          have h₁₆ : p = 2 := by
            apply Nat.Prime.eq_two_of_dvd_two h.out h₁₅
          rw [h₁₆] at hp
          omega
        · have h₁₅ : x = 0 := h₁₄
          rw [h₁₅] at hx
          have h₁₆ : (-1 : ZMod p) = 0 := hx
          exact h₄ h₁₆
      have h₁₁ : { s : ZMod p | s ^ 2 = -1 } = {x, -x} := by
        ext s
        constructor
        · intro hs
          have h₁₂ : s ^ 2 = x ^ 2 := by simp [hs, hx]
          have h₁₃ : s = x ∨ s = -x := by
            apply sq_eq_sq_iff_eq_or_eq_neg
            exact h₁₂
          cases' h₁₃ with h₁₄ h₁₄
          · left; exact h₁₄
          · right; exact h₁₄
        · intro hs
          cases' hs with hs hs
          · rw [hs]; exact hx
          · rw [hs]; exact h₉
      rw [h₁₁]
      simp [h₁₀]
    exact h₇

use (p - 1) / 4
    intro hp
    rw [hp]
    have h₁ : p ≠ 0 := Nat.Prime.ne_zero h.out
    have h₂ : p ≠ 1 := Nat.Prime.ne_one h.out
    have h₃ : (4 * ((p - 1) / 4) + 1 : ℕ) = p := by omega
    clear h₃
    have h₄ : (p : ZMod p) = 0 := by simp
    have h₅ : (-1 : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_contra
      rw [ZMod.intCast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd] at h_contra
      have h₆ : p ∣ 1 := by simpa using h_contra
      exact Nat.Prime.not_dvd_one h.out h₆
    have h₆ : (ZMod p).charP := inferInstance
    have h₇ : Fintype (ZMod p) := inferInstance
    have h₈ : FiniteField (ZMod p) := by
      apply FiniteField.ofPrime
      exact h.out
    have h₉ : ∃ x : ZMod p, x ^ 2 = -1 := by
      apply FiniteField.exists_sq_eq_of_card_eq_one_mod_four
      rw [hp]
      norm_num
    have h₁₀ : Fintype.card { s : ZMod p | s ^ 2 = -1 } = 2 := by
      apply Eq.symm
      apply Eq.symm
      apply FiniteField.card_solutions_sq_eq_of_exists_sq_eq
      exact h₉
    exact h₁₀

use (p - 1) / 4
    intro hp
    have h₁ : p ≠ 0 := Nat.Prime.ne_zero h.out
    have h₂ : p % 4 = 1 := by omega
    have h₃ : (-1 : ZMod p) ^ ((p - 1) / 2) = 1 := by
      rw [ZMod.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one]
      · simp [h₁]
      · exact Nat.Prime.pos h.out
    have h₄ : (∃ x : ZMod p, x ^ 2 = -1) := by
      apply ZMod.exists_sq_eq_prime_iff
      · exact h.out
      · exact h₂
    have h₅ : Finset.card { s : ZMod p | s ^ 2 = -1 } = 2 := by
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h₄
      have h₆ : x ≠ 0 := by
        intro h₇
        simp_all
      have h₇ : (-x) ^ 2 = x ^ 2 := by simp [pow_two]
      have h₈ : x ≠ -x := by
        intro h₉
        apply h₆
        simpa [h₉] using eq_neg_self_iff.mp h₉
      have h₉ : {s : ZMod p | s ^ 2 = -1} = {x, -x} := by
        ext s
        simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton, sq, neg_mul_neg]
        constructor
        · intro hs
          have h₁₀ : (s - x) * (s + x) = 0 := by
            simp [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, ← sub_eq_add_neg, ← sub_eq_add_neg, hx, hs]
          simpa [eq_neg_iff_add_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero, add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg] using h₁₀
        · rintro (rfl | rfl) <;> simp [hx]
      simp [h₉, h₈]
    exact h₅
